full_text:
Emperor Jing [Liu Qi] 漢景帝劉啟
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Emperor Jing [Liu Qi] (漢景帝劉啟). Emperor Jing was the sixth Han Dynasty emperor. Emperor Jing [Liu Qi] was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Emperor Jing [Liu Qi] lived during the Former Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
Return to theThree Kingdoms Encyclopediaor browse theEncyclopedia Directory.
